title: Parle Products is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Parle Products is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Parle Products has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Parle Products:
Parle Products is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products!
